guide:
🏖️ Elite Beaches: Rhodes East & South

BeachRatingTypeBest For
Anthony Quinn⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐Emerald CoveSnorkeling
Lindos / St. Pauls⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐Golden SandViews & Couples
Prasonisi⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐Sand SpitWindsurfing/Nature
Tsambika⭐⭐⭐⭐Soft SandFamilies

📅 5-Day Knights & Coastline Itinerary

Day 1: The Walled City (~15km). Pickup car and drive to Rhodes Town. Spend the day inside the UNESCO Medieval City. Overnight in Rhodes Town.
Day 2: The Acropolis Drive (~50km). Head south. Stop at Anthony Quinn Bay for a swim, then settle into the white-washed village of Lindos.
Day 3: The Deep South (~90km). Drive to the southern tip where the Aegean and Mediterranean seas meet at Prasonisi. Raw, windy, and spectacular.
Day 4: The Wild West Coast (~75km). Explore the dramatic Monolithos Castle perched on a cliff, then visit the ruins of Ancient Kamiros.
Day 5: Inland Nature & Exit (~60km). Walk through the shaded Valley of Butterflies and the tunnel of Seven Springs before heading back to the airport.
💡 Pro Tip: The West Coast has much rougher seas than the East. If you want calm water for swimming, stick to the Lindos side.
